note: Hourly conditional logistic regression (time-stratified case-crossover). Strata = (year, month, hour-of-day): within each stratum, report-hours (cases) are compared to non-report control-hours at the same hour of the same calendar month. This differences out diurnal reporting behavior AND the solar/hour-of-day collinearity. No intercept (conditional logit). At inference, the 24 hourly z-values are re-centered so their mean equals logit(daily_ORI/100), anchoring the within-day shape to the calibrated daily ORI without changing its level.

features_omitted.solar_radiation: Absorbed by hour-of-day strata (near-collinear with hour-of-day)
features_omitted.diurnal_temperature_range: Daily max-min by construction; zero variance within a single hour

metadata.anchoring: At inference: shift all 24 hourly z-values by (logit(daily_ORI/100) - mean(z_24h)) so the 24-hour mean maps to the calibrated daily ORI.
